##接口调用地址 
 生产环境地址：https://api.cmbchina.com/itrip/xft-api/v1/budget/budget-sub-plan/create 
 测试环境地址：https://api.cmburl.cn:8065/itrip/xft-api/uat/v1/budget/budget-sub-plan/create 
 ## 接口描述 
本接口适用于预算方案下的子方案创建功能，每个预算方案可以创建月度子方案、季度子方案、年度子方案，三个维度的子方案。
 
## 调用方式 
 METHOD: POST  
 CONTENT-TYPE: application/json 
## 接口输入参数 
 <restparamstable>[{"elementData":{"name":"root","type":"OBJECT","desc":"%20%E8%AF%B7%E6%B1%82%E5%A4%B4%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9","label":"%E8%99%9A%E6%8B%9F%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9"}}]</restparamstable><restparamstable>[{"elementData":{"name":"root","type":"OBJECT","desc":"%20%E8%AF%B7%E6%B1%82%E4%BD%93%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9","label":"%E8%99%9A%E6%8B%9F%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9"},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"LONG","name":"budgetParentPlanSeqId","required":true,"label":"%E9%A2%84%E7%AE%97%E6%96%B9%E6%A1%88id","exampleValue":"1286","desc":"","maxLength":"20"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"budgetTurnType","required":true,"label":"%E9%A1%BA%E5%BB%B6%E6%96%B9%E5%BC%8F","exampleValue":"0","desc":"%200%E4%B8%8D%E9%A1%BA%E5%BB%B6%2C1%E6%AF%8F%E4%B8%AA%E7%BC%96%E8%91%97%E5%91%A8%E6%9C%9F%E6%9C%AB%E8%87%AA%E5%8A%A8%E9%A1%BA%E5%BB%B6","maxLength":"1"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"budgetWarningType","required":true,"label":"%E9%A2%84%E7%AE%97%E9%A2%84%E8%AD%A6%E6%96%B9%E5%BC%8F","exampleValue":"2","desc":"%201%E9%A2%84%E8%AD%A6%E6%8F%90%E7%A4%BA%2C2%E4%B8%8D%E9%A2%84%E8%AD%A6","maxLength":"1"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"budgetWarningRate","maxLength":"3","exampleValue":"10","label":"%E9%A2%84%E7%AE%97%E9%A2%84%E8%AD%A6%E7%99%BE%E5%88%86%E6%AF%94"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"budgetCycle","required":true,"label":"%E9%A2%84%E7%AE%97%E5%91%A8%E6%9C%9F%E7%B1%BB%E5%9E%8B","exampleValue":"2","desc":"%201%E6%9C%88%E5%BA%A6%E9%A2%84%E7%AE%97%2C2%E5%AD%A3%E5%BA%A6%E9%A2%84%E7%AE%97%2C3%E5%B9%B4%E5%BA%A6%E9%A2%84%E7%AE%97","maxLength":"1"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"budgetControlType","required":true,"label":"%E8%B6%85%E9%A2%84%E7%AE%97%E6%8E%A7%E5%88%B6%E6%96%B9%E5%BC%8F","exampleValue":"1","desc":"%201%E4%B8%8D%E5%BE%97%E6%8F%90%E4%BA%A4%2C2%E4%B8%8D%E6%8E%A7%E5%88%B6","maxLength":"1"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"cycleControl","required":true,"label":"%E6%8E%A7%E5%88%B6%E5%91%A8%E6%9C%9F%E7%B1%BB%E5%9E%8B","exampleValue":"2","desc":"%201%E6%9C%88%E5%BA%A6%202%E5%AD%A3%E5%BA%A6%203%E5%B9%B4%E5%BA%A6","maxLength":"1"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"opsEmpNumber","required":true,"label":"%E6%93%8D%E4%BD%9C%E4%BA%BA%E8%8A%B1%E5%90%8D%E5%86%8C%E7%BC%96%E7%A0%81","exampleValue":"18351911114","desc":"","maxLength":"50"}}]}]</restparamstable><restparamstable>[{"elementData":{"name":"root","type":"OBJECT","desc":"%20query%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9","label":"%E8%99%9A%E6%8B%9F%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9"}}]</restparamstable>

%A8","maxLength":"1"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"budgetCycle","required":false,"label":"%E9%A2%84%E7%AE%97%E5%91%A8%E6%9C%9F%E7%B1%BB%E5%9E%8B","exampleValue":"2","desc":"%201%E6%9C%88%E5%BA%A6%E9%A2%84%E7%AE%97%2C2%E5%AD%A3%E5%BA%A6%E9%A2%84%E7%AE%97%2C3%E5%B9%B4%E5%BA%A6%E9%A2%84%E7%AE%97","maxLength":"1"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"budgetControlType","required":false,"label":"%E8%B6%85%E9%A2%84%E7%AE%97%E6%8E%A7%E5%88%B6%E6%96%B9%E5%BC%8F","exampleValue":"1","desc":"%201%E4%B8%8D%E5%BE%97%E6%8F%90%E4%BA%A4%2C2%E4%B8%8D%E6%8E%A7%E5%88%B6","maxLength":"1"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"budgetWarningType","required":false,"label":"%E9%A2%84%E7%AE%97%E9%A2%84%E8%AD%A6%E6%96%B9%E5%BC%8F","exampleValue":"2","desc":"%201%E9%A2%84%E8%AD%A6%E6%8F%90%E7%A4%BA%2C2%E4%B8%8D%E9%A2%84%E8%AD%A6","maxLength":"1"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"budgetWarningRate","required":false,"label":"%E9%A2%84%E7%AE%97%E9%A2%84%E8%AD%A6%E7%99%BE%E5%88%86%E6%AF%94","exampleValue":"null","desc":"","maxLength":"3"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"budgetTurnType","required":false,"label":"%E9%A1%BA%E5%BB%B6%E6%96%B9%E5%BC%8F","exampleValue":"1","desc":"%200%E4%B8%8D%E9%A1%BA%E5%BB%B6%2C1%E6%AF%8F%E4%B8%AA%E7%BC%96%E8%91%97%E5%91%A8%E6%9C%9F%E6%9C%AB%E8%87%AA%E5%8A%A8%E9%A1%BA%E5%BB%B6","maxLength":"1"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"cycleControl","required":false,"label":"%E6%8E%A7%E5%88%B6%E5%91%A8%E6%9C%9F%E7%B1%BB%E5%9E%8B","exampleValue":"2","desc":"%201%E6%9C%88%E5%BA%A6%202%E5%AD%A3%E5%BA%A6%203%E5%B9%B4%E5%BA%A6","maxLength":"1"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"crtId","required":false,"label":"%E5%88%9B%E5%BB%BA%E4%BA%BAID","exampleValue":"42603","desc":"","maxLength":"50"}}]},{"elementData":{"type":"BOOLEAN","name":"success","required":false,"label":"%E6%8E%A5%E5%8F%A3%E8%B0%83%E7%94%A8%E6%88%90%E5%8A%9F%E7%8A%B6%E6%80%81","exampleValue":"true","desc":"%20true%E8%AF%B4%E6%98%8E%E6%8E%A5%E5%8F%A3%E8%B0%83%E7%94%A8%E6%88%90%E5%8A%9F%20false%E8%AF%B4%E6%98%8E%E6%8E%A5%E5%8F%A3%E8%B0%83%E7%94%A8%E5%A4%B1%E8%B4%A5","maxLength":"5"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"message","required":false,"label":"%E6%8E%A5%E5%8F%A3%E8%B0%83%E7%94%A8%E8%BF%94%E5%9B%9E%E4%BF%A1%E6%81%AF","exampleValue":"%E8%B0%83%E7%94%A8%E6%88%90%E5%8A%9F%EF%BC%81","desc":"","maxLength":"500"}}]}]</restparamstable> 
## 接口调用示例 
 ### 请求报文
```json
{
  "budgetParentPlanSeqId": "1286",
  "budgetTurnType": "0",
  "budgetWarningType": 2,
  "budgetCycle": 2,
  "budgetControlType": 1,
  "cycleControl":"2",
  "opsEmpNumber":"18351911114"
}
```
### 响应报文
```json
{
    "data": {
        "budgetPlanSeqId": 1999,
        "budgetParentPlanSeqId": 1286,
        "budgetName": "异常1118",
        "budgetDimension": "1",
        "budgetEventControl": "0",
        "budgetState": "1",
        "budgetCycle": "2",
        "budgetControlType": "1",
        "budgetWarningType": "2",
        "budgetWarningRate": null,
        "budgetTurnType": "1",
        "cycleControl": "2",
        "crtId": 42603
    },
    "success": true,
    "message": "调用成功！"
}
```
### 更新失败的响应报文，示例仅为其中一部分失败样例
```json
{  
    "returnCode": "E0001",  
    "success": false,  
    "message": "业务错误: 预算方案不存在，请检查后重试！"  
}  
```
### 更新失败的响应报文，示例仅为其中一部分失败样例
```json
{  
    "code": "E0002",  
    "message": "预算方案自增ID不能为空;"  
}  
```  
## 错误码说明 
sucess为更新成功状态， true为成功 其余都是失败
| 常见报错| 
  | --- |
  | 预算预警百分比不能为空|
  | 控制周期类型不能小于预算周期|
|方案周期类型或控制周期类型不能为空 |
|控制周期力度必须大于方案周期，请检查输入 |
body.docCntHtml:
接口调用地址

生产环境地址：https://api.cmbchina.com/itrip/xft-api/v1/budget/budget-sub-plan/create

测试环境地址：https://api.cmburl.cn:8065/itrip/xft-api/uat/v1/budget/budget-sub-plan/create

接口描述

本接口适用于预算方案下的子方案创建功能，每个预算方案可以创建月度子方案、季度子方案、年度子方案，三个维度的子方案。

调用方式

METHOD: POST

CONTENT-TYPE: APPLICATION/JSON

接口输入参数

{"requestHeader":[{"elementData":{"name":"root","type":"OBJECT","desc":"%20%E8%AF%B7%E6%B1%82%E5%A4%B4%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9","label":"%E8%99%9A%E6%8B%9F%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9"}}],"requestBody":[{"elementData":{"name":"root","type":"OBJECT","desc":"%20%E8%AF%B7%E6%B1%82%E4%BD%93%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9","label":"%E8%99%9A%E6%8B%9F%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9"},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"LONG","name":"budgetParentPlanSeqId","required":true,"label":"%E9%A2%84%E7%AE%97%E6%96%B9%E6%A1%88id","exampleValue":"1286","desc":"","maxLength":"20"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"budgetTurnType","required":true,"label":"%E9%A1%BA%E5%BB%B6%E6%96%B9%E5%BC%8F","exampleValue":"0","desc":"%200%E4%B8%8D%E9%A1%BA%E5%BB%B6%2C1%E6%AF%8F%E4%B8%AA%E7%BC%96%E8%91%97%E5%91%A8%E6%9C%9F%E6%9C%AB%E8%87%AA%E5%8A%A8%E9%A1%BA%E5%BB%B6","maxLength":"1"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"budgetWarningType","required":true,"label":"%E9%A2%84%E7%AE%97%E9%A2%84%E8%AD%A6%E6%96%B9%E5%BC%8F","exampleValue":"2","desc":"%201%E9%A2%84%E8%AD%A6%E6%8F%90%E7%A4%BA%2C2%E4%B8%8D%E9%A2%84%E8%AD%A6","maxLength":"1"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"budgetWarningRate","maxLength":"3","exampleValue":"10","label":"%E9%A2%84%E7%AE%97%E9%A2%84%E8%AD%A6%E7%99%BE%E5%88%86%E6%AF%94"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"budgetCycle","required":true,"label":"%E9%A2%84%E7%AE%97%E5%91%A8%E6%9C%9F%E7%B1%BB%E5%9E%8B","exampleValue":"2","desc":"%201%E6%9C%88%E5%BA%A6%E9%A2%84%E7%AE%97%2C2%E5%AD%A3%E5%BA%A6%E9%A2%84%E7%AE%97%2C3%E5%B9%B4%E5%BA%A6%E9%A2%84%E7%AE%97","maxLength":"1"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"budgetControlType","required":true,"label":"%E8%B6%85%E9%A2%84%E7%AE%97%E6%8E%A7%E5%88%B6%E6%96%B9%E5%BC%8F","exampleValue":"1","desc":"%201%E4%B8%8D%E5%BE%97%E6%8F%90%E4%BA%A4%2C2%E4%B8%8D%E6%8E%A7%E5%88%B6","maxLength":"1"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"cycleControl","required":true,"label":"%E6%8E%A7%E5%88%B6%E5%91%A8%E6%9C%9F%E7%B1%BB%E5%9E%8B","exampleValue":"2","desc":"%201%E6%9C%88%E5%BA%A6%202%E5%AD%A3%E5%BA%A6%203%E5%B9%B4%E5%BA%A6","maxLength":"1"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"opsEmpNumber","required":true,"label":"%E6%93%8D%E4%BD%9C%E4%BA%BA%E8%8A%B1%E5%90%8D%E5%86%8C%E7%BC%96%E7%A0%81","exampleValue":"18351911114","desc":"","maxLength":"50"}}]}],"requestQuery":[{"elementData":{"name":"root","type":"OBJECT","desc":"%20query%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9","label":"%E8%99%9A%E6%8B%9F%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9"}}]}

接口调用示例

请求报文

{
  "budgetParentPlanSeqId": "1286",
  "budgetTurnType": "0",
  "budgetWarningType": 2,
  "budgetCycle": 2,
  "budgetControlType": 1,
  "cycleControl":"2",
  "opsEmpNumber":"18351911114"
}

响应报文

{
    "data": {
        "budgetPlanSeqId": 1999,
        "budgetParentPlanSeqId": 1286,
        "budgetName": "异常1118",
        "budgetDimension": "1",
        "budgetEventControl": "0",
        "budgetState": "1",
        "budgetCycle": "2",
        "budgetControlType": "1",
        "budgetWarningType": "2",
        "budgetWarningRate": null,
        "budgetTurnType": "1",
        "cycleControl": "2",
        "crtId": 42603
    },
    "success": true,
    "message": "调用成功！"
}

更新失败的响应报文，示例仅为其中一部分失败样例

{  
    "returnCode": "E0001",  
    "success": false,  
    "message": "业务错误: 预算方案不存在，请检查后重试！"  
}

更新失败的响应报文，示例仅为其中一部分失败样例

{  
    "code": "E0002",  
    "message": "预算方案自增ID不能为空;"  
}

错误码说明

sucess为更新成功状态， true为成功 其余都是失败

常见报错
预算预警百分比不能为空
控制周期类型不能小于预算周期
方案周期类型或控制周期类型不能为空
控制周期力度必须大于方案周期，请检查输入
body.menuLevelName: 开发文档/智能费控/预算
